responses: Hello! Welcome to NeuralChat — your college assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi there! I'm your college AI assistant. Ask me anything about admissions, courses, faculty, or campus life!
Hey! Great to see you. I can help with admissions, courses, fees, exams, and more. What do you need?
Admissions are open from June to August each year. Visit our official portal to fill the application form. You need 60%+ in 10+2 for undergraduate programs.
The admission process involves: 1) Online application via our portal, 2) Entrance test (if applicable), 3) Document verification, 4) Fee payment. The deadline is typically 31st July.
To apply, go to our admissions portal, fill the form, upload your documents (marksheets, ID proof, photos), and pay the registration fee of ₹500. Merit lists are published in August.
We offer B.Tech (CSE, ECE, ME, CE), M.Tech, BCA, MCA, BBA, MBA, and B.Sc programs. Each program is 4 years (B.Tech) or 2 years (M.Tech/MBA/MCA).
Our key programs include: B.Tech in Computer Science, Electronics, Mechanical & Civil Engineering; BCA/MCA for computer applications; BBA/MBA for management. Interested in a specific branch?
The Computer Science department offers subjects like Machine Learning, DBMS, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, Algorithms, Software Engineering, and Cloud Computing.
Our Computer Science department has 25+ qualified faculty including PhD holders from IITs and NITs. The HOD is Dr. Rajan Mehta (PhD, IIT Bombay).
Key faculty members: Dr. Priya Sharma (ML & AI), Prof. Arun Kumar (DBMS), Dr. Neha Patel (Networks), Prof. Sunita Rao (Algorithms). Visit our website for the full directory.
All our faculty members hold at least a Master's degree, with 60% being PhDs. They regularly publish research papers and guide student projects. Contact the admin office for specific faculty details.
Semester exams are held in November–December (odd sem) and April–May (even sem). Mid-term exams are in September and February. Check the exam portal for exact dates.
The exam pattern: Mid-term (30 marks) + End-term (70 marks). Passing marks are 40% in each subject. Supplementary exams are held in June–July for students with backlogs.
Examination forms must be filled online at least 2 weeks before exams. The hall ticket/admit card is issued 1 week prior to the exam. Carry your college ID to the exam hall.
The central library is open Monday–Saturday, 8 AM to 8 PM. Students can borrow up to 3 books for 14 days. A fine of ₹2/day applies for late returns.
The library has 50,000+ books, 200+ journals, and access to e-resources like IEEE Xplore, Springer, and NPTEL. Get your library card from the library desk with your student ID.
Digital library resources are accessible 24/7 via the college portal using your student login. Physical library is on the 2nd floor of the Main Building. Wi-Fi is available inside.
We have separate hostels for boys and girls on campus. Hostel fee is ₹45,000/year including mess charges. Rooms are available in single, double, and triple occupancy.
Hostel facilities include: 24/7 security, Wi-Fi, gym, common room, laundry, canteen, and RO water. The hostel warden office is open 9 AM–6 PM. Apply via the admission portal.
Hostel rules: No entry after 10 PM without prior permission, no electrical appliances except laptops & phones, no outsiders without warden permission. Mess provides 3 meals daily.
B.Tech fees: ₹1,20,000/year. BCA: ₹60,000/year. MBA: ₹1,50,000/year. Fees include tuition, development, and exam charges. Payment accepted online or via DD in favor of the college.
Scholarships available: Government scholarship for SC/ST/OBC, Merit scholarship (top 5% of class), Sports scholarship. Apply via the scholarship portal before October 31st.
Fee payment deadline is the 15th of the month at the start of each semester. Late fees attract a ₹50/day penalty. Pay online via the student portal using UPI, Net Banking, or Credit Card.
Classes run Monday–Saturday, 9 AM to 5 PM. Theory classes are 1 hour each; lab sessions are 2–3 hours. Download the semester timetable from the academic portal.

Typical daily schedule: 9–10 AM (Period 1), 10–11 AM (Period 2), 11–12 PM (Period 3), 12–1 PM (Lunch Break), 1–2 PM (Period 4), 2–3 PM (Period 5), 3–5 PM (Lab/Tutorial). Check your section's specific timetable on the portal.
The timetable is published on the first day of each semester. Find it on the student portal under 'Academics → Timetable'. Changes are notified via the college app and notice boards.
Main Office: +91-98765-43210 | Email: info@neuralcollege.edu.in | Address: Neural College Campus, Tech Park Road, Pune – 411001. Office hours: Mon–Sat, 9 AM – 5 PM.
Helpdesk: helpdesk@neuralcollege.edu.in | Admissions: admissions@neuralcollege.edu.in | Principal's Office: principal@neuralcollege.edu.in | Emergency: +91-98765-11111 (24/7).
You can visit us at Neural College, Tech Park Road, Pune. The admin block is opposite the main gate. For online queries, use the contact form on our official website.
Upcoming events: TechNova (Technical Fest – March 15–17), Euphoria (Cultural Fest – February 10–12), National Hackathon (April 5), Annual Sports Meet (January 20). Register on the events portal.
We host 50+ events annually including hackathons, workshops, guest lectures by industry experts, coding contests, and cultural performances. Check the events calendar on the college website.
The next major event is TechNova, our annual technical fest. Registration is open now. Participate in coding, robotics, AI model challenge, and paper presentation events. Prizes worth ₹5 Lakhs!
Goodbye! Have a great day. Feel free to come back anytime you need help! 👋
Thanks for chatting with NeuralChat! Best of luck with your studies. 🎓
See you around! If you have more questions, I'm always here to help. Bye! 😊
